article.title: Seth Troxler: Detroit Roots and Berlin Techno Ascendancy
article.subtitle: A young producer making significant strides in the European techno scene.
article.author: A. Stern
article.excerpt: At 22, Seth Troxler has already established a notable presence in techno. His Detroit roots and recent relocation to Berlin have positioned him within the elite of the European techno scene.

content.text: Seth Troxler, at 22, has quickly become a notable figure in techno. His Detroit roots are unmistakable, and his recent relocation to Berlin has already earned him a place in the elite of the European techno scene.
Troxler's musical influences include the chirping of crickets, the whirring of space ships, and the sweet sounds of whistling voodoo magic. These elements contribute to his distinctive techno sound.
With releases on revered labels such as Spectral, Wagon Repair, and M_NUS, Troxler has built a solid discography. His work is characterized by a distinctive approach to techno production.

Recent releases include This Is Then, DJ-Kicks (Seth Troxler) [DJ Mix], Mixmag Presents Seth Troxler: The Illusion Nouveau (DJ Mix), Mixmag Presents Jamie Jones vs. Seth Troxler, and Love Never Sleeps.
